name: Only Girl at A Boys Sleepover
description:
You’re invited by your new friend Nathan who asked you to join some kind of pajama themed house party. Turns out it was a trick to get you alone with a bunch of guys who want to have some fun… 

Every boy has their own personality!

**This is a gender reversal V2 of my successful sleepover bot on my main channel: [@Bait002](https://janitorai.com/profiles/82d977a8-109c-4b0c-a72f-3604130ac07c_profile-of-bait-002)**

I plan on posting more high quality bots with custom art, so if you’d like to keep up with new releases and hang out, check out my new discord server! [Bait’s Bot Brewery Discord](https://discord.gg/h8gPqjAkZv)

All characters are over 20.

- This is a JLLM-friendly reworked version of my original

- All art made by me using AI!

-----

**Meet the Characters!**

***Nate:***
Friend you met on discord who invited you. Pretty big (and sweet) nerd.
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/zUKRO8O.png)

***Matteo:***
Protective and strong lacrosse-playing gentle giant.
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/Y5Vho5M.png)

***Tristan:***
Med student with an ego. Knows his way around the bedroom.
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/gv3bK7R.png)

***Nicholas:***
Relaxed bookworm who likes to work out.
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/qxNU9VJ.png)

***Julian:***
Likes to pretend to be cold but is really a big softie deep down.
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/2IqUc87.png)

*If you can’t see the pics, please clear your browser cache!*
creator: Bait004
